hero.title_line_2: and a strategy you can follow.
hero.subtitle: Connect your socials and get a personalized 6–12 month plan, built around your niche, content style and goals.

calendar.title: Calendar + inspo

features.title: Everything you need to go from random posting to a real system
features.subtitle: The app helps you understand your content, generate a strategy, and actually plan what to publish next.
features.aiStrategy_title: AI strategy built around your profile
features.aiStrategy_desc: Complete onboarding as a creator or business owner and get a tailored social media strategy based on your goals, audience, time, and content direction.
features.insights_title: See your social media insights in one place
features.insights_desc: Connect Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube and understand your performance from one dashboard instead of switching between multiple apps.
features.calendar_title: Turn strategy into a real content calendar
features.calendar_desc: Generate ideas directly into your calendar, see what should be posted next, and keep your workflow structured and consistent.
features.inspo_desc: Attach links and images to each calendar item so every post has its own moodboard, references, and creative direction.
features.creatorBusiness_title: Built for creators and business owners
features.creatorBusiness_desc: Whether you want more followers, better consistency, more leads, or stronger positioning, the app adapts to your profile type.
features.workflow_desc: Go from raw platform data to strategic decisions, and from strategy to scheduled content, all inside one workflow.

howItWorks.title: From onboarding to a structured content workflow
howItWorks.step1_desc: Tell the app who you are, what you want to achieve, who your audience is, and what type of content fits your profile.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Link Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube so the app can pull insights and understand what already works for you.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Get a clear strategy with positioning, content pillars, platform-specific direction, growth moves, and next steps.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Your ideas and scheduled posts are added into the calendar so you can review, edit, and execute faster.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: The app is built for creators and business owners who want a clearer system for strategy, insights, and content planning.
faq.q2: Do I need experience in social media strategy?
faq.a2: No. The onboarding and AI strategy are designed to guide you even if you're just starting out.
faq.a3: Currently Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. More integrations will be added later.
faq.q4: Can I still use it if I don't connect accounts?
faq.a4: Yes. You can still generate strategies and plan content manually, but insights improve when platforms are connected.
faq.a5: Not primarily. It focuses on strategy, planning, and workflow clarity rather than just scheduling posts.

cta.title: Build your strategy, connect your platforms, and plan content with more clarity
cta.subtitle: Whether you are growing a personal brand or trying to get more leads and sales for your business, the app gives you a clearer system for content.

onboarding.title: Quick setup
onboarding.subtitle: Answer a few questions so we can personalize your strategy.

step1.title: About you
step1.creatorType: What kind of creator are you?

step2.title: Your goal
step2.goal: Main goal for the next 6–12 months
step2.intensity: How aggressive should the strategy be?
step2.time: How much time can you spend per week?

step3.title: Preferences
step3.constraints: What do you NOT want to do?
step3.audience: Optional: describe your audience in one sentence
step3.audiencePlaceholder: e.g. young women interested in routines and self-improvement

creator.title: Content Creator
creator.goalsPlaceholder: e.g. grow +20% followers, brand deals, monetization…
creator.challengesPlaceholder: e.g. lack of ideas, limited time, low performance…
creator.avoidContent: What content do you want to avoid?
creator.avoidContentPlaceholder: e.g. politics, very long content, trends…

business.title: Business Owner
business.industryPlaceholder: e.g. beauty, fitness, e-commerce, local services…
business.productsServicesPlaceholder: What you sell, briefly + what differentiates you.
business.kpiTargetsPlaceholder: e.g. 50 leads/month, 10 sales from IG, 3% CTR…
business.idealCustomerPlaceholder: Age, location, job, needs, online habits…
business.avoidContentPlaceholder: e.g. long videos, trends, something that doesn't fit the brand…
